posts.text: Danny Kruger, a Reform UK traditionalist, admires the “pre-industrial glory” of rural England before the young were lured to the cities. The party’s leader, on the other hand, likes trading, gambling, crypto and Dubai https://www.economist.com/britain/2026/04/01/the-tarts-and-vicars-party?taid=69cf4e0876384e00010abbeb&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text:
BREAKING: 50% of Iran's missile launchers and thousands of attack drones remain intact and in Iran's arsenal despite daily US-Israeli strikes, per CNN.

US intelligence also shows a "large percentage" of Iran’s coastal defense cruise missiles intact, allowing them to keep the Strait of Hormuz closed.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: My team continued to explore new innovations on a daily basis and when we consider what is possible when attempting to deliver best in class solutions, the key ingredient is turbostratic fractal graphene.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
